CreatedBy.Description: The user who created this record.

CreatedDateTime.Description: The date and time the record was created.

LastModBy.Description: The last user to modify the record.

LastModDateTime.Description: The date and time the record was last modified.

LoginId.Description: Customer's ITSM Login ID.  Primary used for Incident Filtering for Self Service.

Owner.Description: The user who owns this record.

OwnerTeam.Description: The team of the user that owns the record.

OwnerType.Description: The type of user who owns this record.

OwnerTeamEmail.Description: It stores provider's manager email address

OwnershipAssignmentEmail.Description: This is calculated field based on OwnerEmail and OwnerTeamEmail to store email address that should be used for Incident Assignment Notification

IsReportedByAlternateContact.Description: If this field is TRUE, it will enable the Associated Item Selector for Alternate Contact

ProblemLink.Description: Link field to associate Incidents with Problem

CostPerMinute.Description: Stores the Calculated cost/minute to resolve the incident

IsInFinalState.Description: Keep track of the My Items State

PreviousState.Description: Saves the previous state of the incident used in unlinking problem

NewNotes.Description: Temporary Text field to content for new Notes for Activity History

CreatedByType.Description: System Field to record which client was used to create this Incident, such as Web Client or Self Service. This field is created for Reports

ivnt_UpdateRFI.Description: This field is used only for dashboard

AddChatconversationtoActivityHistory.DisplayName: Add Chat conversation to Activity History

RecommendedCategory.Description: Category Recommended by neurons AI/ML model based on triggered field value

RecommendedService.Description: Service Recommended by neurons AI/ML model based on triggered field value

RecommendedSubCategory.Description: SubCategory Recommended by neurons AI/ML model based on triggered field value

Accuracy.Description: Accuracy is the recommendations probability made by neurons AI/ML model

IsRecommended.Description: IsRecommended field will be true if recommendations made by neurons AI/ML model are accepted

nrn_SummaryHistory.Description: Used to store the User Interaction History

RecommendedTeam.Description: Stores the Recommended Team from the Ticket Classification Service
